name: manual_357709
claim: Always run npx tsc --noEmit after every code change and before reporting completion to the user. Never report success without a clean type check. This catches regressions early and maintains the strict TypeScript discipline Victor expects.

decisions.notes: Established pattern across all Phase 2-3 work. Every step in the revised implementation plan ends with a tsc check. Victor expects zero type errors before manual testing.

rationale: Established pattern across all Phase 2-3 work. Every step in the revised implementation plan ends with a tsc check. Victor expects zero type errors before manual testing.
